plan_adherence_notes: No execution work is present on this branch. Relative to `ff/Tbayes-market-dej-v3`, the diff only adds `.fleet/tasks/bayes-market-dej-v3-execute-step-2/{questions,research,plan}.json`; `backend/server.py` and `tests/test_bayes_market_api.py` are unchanged. As a result, none of planned steps 1-5 landed: there is still no broadcaster/snapshot seam, `build_terminal_response(...)` still stops after `record_terminal_outcome(...)`, `handle_market_resolution(...)` still executes outside `get_market_write_lock(...)`, and no Phase 4 tests were added. Existing backend API coverage still passes (`pytest tests/test_bayes_market_api.py -q`: 206 passed).
missed_questions: Should `handle_market_resolution(...)` move under `get_market_write_lock(market_id)` so same-market writes and the final live snapshot are serialized?
What injectable broadcaster/test seam will verify publish-before-close ordering and best-effort failure isolation without real socket fan-out?
reason: The plan follows from the research, but this branch does not execute it. There are no production-code or test changes beyond the task artifacts, so the requested Phase 4 live-price publishing behavior was neither implemented nor validated here.
